title: Build on Anthropic, the plates

rejectedPoles: visible edge thickness or side faces

note: The illustrated layer for buildonanthropic.com and the campaign decks. Deliberately CHARACTERLESS: the storybook cast is a rejected pole here, because a plate is a diagrammatic gesture and not a scene from the story. Flat terracotta, wobbly single-weight black ink, loopy hands, cream fills, and never any text, because the words live in the page around the plate.
